ionospheric_handling: ionosphere-free linear combination of BDS B1I/B3I signals
domain_relevance_reason: Directly evaluates real-time kinematic positioning using BDS-3 PPP-B2b service.
novelty_audit: Moderate novelty: extends previous static PPP-B2b evaluations to real‑time kinematic scenarios with detailed comparison against reference products.
metrics: Orbit and clock correction accuracy vs. post‑processed GBM products; real‑time kinematic PPP positioning accuracy (e.g., RMS, 95% errors).
main_results: Not fully detailed in the provided text; expected to quantify PPP-B2b kinematic positioning precision and convergence under open‑sky conditions.
datasets: BDS-3 PPP-B2b real‑time correction stream from B2b signal, broadcast ephemeris, GFZ GBM post‑processed multi‑GNSS products, IGS‑provided satellite PCO models.
reason: The paper directly evaluates the real-time kinematic positioning performance of the BDS-3 PPP-B2b service.
